description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a prominent black hose attached near the top. The extinguisher features a large, white instructional label on the front, including pictograms and text, and a brass valve assembly at the top with a black handle and lever. The hose is flexible, secured to the side with a black strap, and curves downward, ending in a nozzle. The surface of the extinguisher shows some wear and minor scuff marks, indicating use or age. The base is octagonal and made of a sturdy black material, likely plastic or rubber, providing stability. The overall design is functional and typical for portable fire extinguishers found in urban environments.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, brass valve, and white instructional label on the front. The base is black and octagonal, and the surface shows minor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white instructional label, black hose attached to the side, and the brass valve with black handle on top.
description_view_1: Side-rear angled view revealing the cylindrical body, black base, and the top handle, with the label partially visible.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, with the label and hose clearly visible, and the handle and nozzle assembly at the top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the full length of the black hose running vertically down the back, with the label mostly hidden.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white label with red and white pictograms and text on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black flexible hose attached near the top, curving down the side and secured with a strap; nozzle at the end.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
